ab: yona inu’ ka kaṟal soni aṟ?
en: A: How is the weather today?

ab: makilux ka kaṟal, matata’ wagi’ la.
en: The sun is coming out, it's very hot.

ab: gahṟa’ ka tanux aw?
en: A: Is it going to be cold outside?

ab: kapayux malukus ci lukus, gahṟa’ caṟung.
en: B: It's cold, so wear more clothes.

ab: makilux ka tanux aw?
en: A: Will it be hot outside?

ab: ini kakilux wa, sabehul tikiy uṟi tantana caṟung.
en: B: No, it's windy and cool.

ab: yona inu’ ka kaṟal soni’ aṟ.
en: A: How is the weather today?

ab: tantana caṟung wa, ini kakilux lu ini kagahṟa’ uṟi.
ch: B:今天不冷也不熱，很舒服。
en: B: It's neither cold nor hot today, very comfortable.

ab: yona inu’ ka karal malahngan hiya?
en: A: How is the weather tonight?

ab: pakaṟak hangitux wa, ungat ṟaṟulung ka kaṟal uṟi.
ch: B:天空沒有雲，星星出來了。
en: B: There were no clouds in the sky; the stars came out.

ab: yona inu’ ka kaṟal tanux aṟ?
en: A: How is the weather outside?

ab: pakaṟak ka wagi’, nahna minsot ka awalax, matata’ ka hungu na amutux la.
ch: B:雨剛剛停，出了太陽，彩虹出來了。
en: B: The rain has just stopped, the sun has come out, the rainbow is coming out.

ab: yona inu’ ka kaṟal cimunan hiya aṟ?
en: A: What's the weather like where you are?

ab: nel yaba’ ka behuṟ sani.
en: B: We're going to have a big storm here.

ab: ramas ka kaṟal cimunan?
en: A: How's the weather there?

ab: yaba’ ka wagi’, ramas caṟung.
en: B: Very well, out of the big sun.

ab: maha’ cu papasba’an ci ke’ la.
en: A: I have to go to school.

ab: papayux malukus ci lukus gahṟa’ caṟung ka kaṟal.
en: B: The weather is very cold, so wear more clothes.

ab: maha’ cu la.
en: A: I'm going out.

ab: iya’ ṟungi’ maras ci taṟasi’, yaba’ awalax kira’ haṟi la.
ch: B:等一下會下大雨，你要記得帶傘。
en: B: It's going to rain heavily, you have to remember to bring an umbrella.

ab: mpawalax aw?
en: A: Is it going to rain?

ab: pasbalung ci micuw, hala umolax cubay kira’ haṟi la.
ch: B:剛剛打雷了，等一下應該就會下雨。
en: B: There was thunder just now, and it's supposed to rain later.

ab: umolax la aw?
en: A: Is it raining?

ab: masot micuw hang, minnolax tikiy.
ch: B:剛剛有下雨，現在雨停了。
en: B: It just rained, and now it's stopped.

ab: umolax aw?
en: A: Is it raining?

ab: mahuṟi ka tu’uy, yona minnolax cubay wa.
ch: B:好像下過雨了，馬路是濕的。
en: B: It seems to have rained and the road is wet.

ab: hunco’ mahuṟi’ ka hi’ si su? minnolax aw?
ch: A:有下雨嗎?你怎麼全身都濕了?
en: A: Is it raining? Why are you all wet?

ab: ini’ cu aras ci taṟasi’, nel umolax tanux wa.
ch: B:外面在下雨，我沒有帶雨傘。
en: B: It's raining outside, so I didn't bring an umbrella.

ab: ya su ramas?
en: A: Are you all right?

ab: maku’ nel muhal ka tunux mu tinlaman yupan na bexuṟ.
en: B: The wind is blowing so hard that my head hurts.

ab: ya su ramas?
en: A: Are you all right?

ab: maku’ masmamuy ka tunux mu’, pinsawagen na wagi’.
ch: B:太陽好大，曬得我頭好暈。
en: B: The sun is so big, it makes me dizzy.
